info.title: AI Video Generation API
info.description: API for creating and managing AI-generated videos and storyboards

post.description: Starts an asynchronous task to extract images from a given URL

get.description: Check the status of an image scraping task

post.description: Generate an image using AI based on text description and optional colors

Starts an asynchronous task to generate an image using AI based on prompt and reference image.
Only prompt is required, reference image is optional.
If reference image is provided, it will be used to generate the image.
If reference image is not provided, the image will be generated based on the prompt.
If aspect ratio is not provided, it will be set to 16:9.

get.description: Check the status of an image generation with reference task

post.description:
Starts an asynchronous task to generate an image using AI with fallback chain.
Tries Gemini first, then BlackForest/Flux, then Bedrock.
Only prompt is required, reference image is optional.

get.description: Check the status of an image generation with reference task

post.description:
Create an animation from a static image using Idomoo WAN, Veo, or Runway.
Uses Idomoo service when model_id is IDOMOO_IM2V_MODELS
Uses Veo for 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratios. Veo only support 4/6/8 seconds durations with extension of 7 seconds, will find the closest duration.
Uses Runway for all other cases.
Returns task_id immediately, poll /animate/{task_id} for status.

get.description:
Check the status of an animation task (supports Idomoo WAN, Veo, and Runway).
Idomoo: polls WAN API and updates cache.
Veo: returns cached status (background task updates cache).
Runway: polls Runway API and updates cache.

post.description: Retrieves brand information including icon, name, domain, etc.

get.description: Returns a brand document by ID. Validates that the brand belongs to the requesting account.

put.description: Updates an existing brand document. Only provided fields are updated.

parameters.name: brand_id

schema.description: Unique identifier of the brand to update
schema.title: Brand Id

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the brand to update

post.description: Creates a new brand document for the account.

Start async brand identity extraction from website and/or uploaded assets.

Returns a task_id to poll for results via GET /brands/status/{task_id}.

get.description:
Check the status of a brand extraction task.

Returns the BrandProfile JSON when the task is completed.

Get available voices from ElevenLabs
Returns a list of available voices with their IDs and names

schema.title: Response Get Voices Audio Voices Get
Response Get Voice By Id Audio Voices  Voice Id  Get

delete.description:
Delete a voice by its ID from ElevenLabs.
Only custom voices can be deleted - premade/shared voices will return 400.

schema.title: Response Delete Voice Audio Voices  Voice Id  Delete

post.description: Generate audio narration using ElevenLabs text-to-speech

Starts an asynchronous narration task using ElevenLabs text-to-speech.
Returns task_id immediately, poll /narrate-async/{task_id} for status.

get.description: Check the status of an async narration task

post.description:
Generate captions from an audio file URL using ElevenLabs speech-to-text.
Saves the caption file as <audio_file_name_without_extension>-cc.txt in the same
S3 location (vid_spec_thumbnail_bucket) as the audio, using the extracted S3 key.
Create a custom voice from sample audio file using voice cloning

Generate voice design previews from text description using AI voice generation
Returns an array of previews with S3 audio URLs. User can listen and choose a voice,
then call /voices/custom/add_voice with the selected generated_voice_id
Create a custom voice from a temporary voice ID (generated from design step)
Search for videos in Getty library
Search for images in Getty library
Get download URL for a Getty asset
Get download URL for a Getty asset
Get the largest available download size for a Getty asset
Get the largest available download size for a Getty asset
Search for soundtracks by mood or genre

get.description: Get list of available music moods

post.description: Create the final video based on the blueprint.
Save the video document and video assets, so now on you can edit it.

get.description: Retrieves a specific AI video. Also used to poll if the video is ready.

post.summary: Calculate Scene Duration And Thumb Time
post.description: Calculate durations and thumbnail times for scenes based on audio duration.

Update video specs using natural language prompt with Strands Agent.

This is V2 of the talk-to-video feature using a unified Strands agent
that handles all change types autonomously.

Creates a new video_specs document and regenerates the video.

Internal endpoint: Select scenes based on brief and parameters.
Returns the selected scene list without creating a blueprint.
Create a video blueprint based on a brief, a library of scenes and a duration.
Create a video blueprint based on a brief, a library of scenes and a duration.
Create a blueprint from pre-defined chapters with media and narration.

example.audience_description: Upper-middle-class households aged 25-45, with disposable income
example.prompt: Create an engaging video to promote our summer sale to high-spending customers
example.script:
Ever wondered why we spend a third of our lives asleep?

During sleep, our brains undergo remarkable transformations as brainwaves shift through different cycles, processing information and consolidating memories much like how music influences our mental state.
